message:
perf(vacuum): remove unnecessary per-row clone in partial index eval

eval_join_expr takes &[SqliteValue] — pass the values slice directly
instead of cloning into a Vec on every row. Also hoist the col_map
construction outside the per-index loop since it depends only on the
table schema, not the index.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
